calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-19-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-19-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Defendant Mitsubishi Electric Us, Inc.?S Notice And Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Plaintiff?S Negligent Product Liability, Strict Liability, And Breach Of Warranty Claims
Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Mitsubishi Electric US, Inc.'s unopposed Motion for Summary Adjudication of Plaintiff's Negligent Product Liability, Strict Liability, And Breach Of Warranty Claims is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Continued To Mar-23-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2024 Set For Trial On Jul-14-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
